like_science: Survey context: the student answered that they like science; this text explains why or elaborates.
dislike_science: Survey context: the student answered that they do not like science; this text explains why or elaborates.
stopped_science: Survey context: the student answered they do not like science anymore; this text explains why or elaborates.
like_math: Survey context: the student answered that they like mathematics; this text explains why or elaborates.
dislike_math: Survey context: the student answered that they do not like mathematics; this text explains why or elaborates.
stopped_math: Survey context: the student answered they do not like mathematics anymore; this text explains why or elaborates.
